name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A gentle thought from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled — totally understand, life gets full. No pressure at all, but I wanted to personally send you 20% off your next visit whenever the timing feels right:

{{coupon.code}}

Good for the next 14 days. Just mention it (or use it at checkout) the next time you book a cleaning or consult.

If something about your last experience wasn't quite right, I'd genuinely love to hear — just hit reply. We're always trying to make dental care feel a little less scary, and your honest feedback helps.

Take good care,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a friendly heads up your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} is still good for about a week. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure either way :)

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
